name: Economic Dispatch Optimization
prompt: Read generators.json with 4 generators having quadratic cost curves C_i = a_i*P_i^2 + b_i*P_i + c_i. Find the economic dispatch that minimizes total cost while meeting total_demand=500 MW. Each generator must stay within [min, max] limits. Use the equal incremental cost method: at optimum, marginal cost dC/dP = 2*a*P + b = lambda for all unconstrained generators. Write dispatch.json with: dispatch (array of {id, power, cost}), total_cost (number), lambda (the optimal incremental cost).

criteria.description: Individual costs computed correctly from dispatch values
Total cost is consistent with dispatch

origin.notes: content variant r1 of economic-dispatch — same task type, same structure, different generator cost curves and output limits
